name: Marcus Thorne
bio: Marcus has been with Hexproof for 3 years and led the migration to our current Airflow setup. He specializes in data pipeline reliability.

name: Sarah Chen
bio: Sarah manages our dbt core models and is the primary point of contact for Snowflake optimization. She is based in the same city as Eva.

name: David Okafor
bio: David focuses on ingestion patterns and third-party API integrations. He recently overhauled our Airbyte connectors.

name: Elena Rodriguez
bio: Elena oversees the entire data observability stack. She is an expert in our CI/CD workflows and security protocols.
